summary: Completed testing of Viaje360 Travel Diary feature. Backend API fully functional, frontend loads correctly with all UI elements visible, but mood selector interaction has timing/visibility issues preventing full flow completion.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: net::ERR_ABORTED - endpoint not implemented or accessible

ui_bugs.issue: Mood buttons not clickable - Element is not visible error despite being visually present

integration_issues.issue: Cannot progress past mood selection due to button interaction failure

passed_tests: Mood selector displays 5 emoji options (Increíble, Feliz, Normal, Cansado, Decepcionado)
Diary header and day information display correctly
POST /api/diary endpoint accepts valid data and returns success
POST /api/diary endpoint validates required fields and returns 400 for missing data
GET /api/diary endpoint works with valid parameters
GET /api/diary endpoint validates parameters and returns 400 for missing data
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mood selector button interaction issue - buttons are visually present but not clickable due to visibility/timing problems. May need to check for overlays, z-index issues, or ensure proper element initialization timing. Also implement /api/trips/active endpoint if needed for full functionality.
